justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all temporal expressions from the user, including specific dates and time ranges.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent proposed reasonable alternatives, though it could have offered a slightly wider range of options in the initial unavailability response.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently processed information and made appropriate API calls without any redundant queries or unnecessary turns.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent maintaining a helpful tone throughout and successfully booking the appointment.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained full context and intelligently expanded the search when initial requests were unavailable, leading to a successful booking.
